name: Nuoc Cham (Vietnamese Hot Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Increase the amount of red pepper flakes to suit your taste.
2. Combine garlic, lime peel, and red pepper flakes.
3. Add lime juice, fish sauce, water, and sugar.
4. Whisk until all ingredients are blended and sugar is dissolved.
5. Makes about 1/3 cup. Will keep for short periods if refrigerated.
6. This hot sauce is used almost daily by my Vietnamese sister-in-law and myself, served on vegetables, meats, and fish.
